nasb.text: and are confident that you yourself are a guide to the blind, a light to those who are in darkness,

esv.text: and if you are sure that you yourself are a guide to the blind, a light to those who are in darkness,

cnv.text: 自信是瞎子的嚮導，在黑暗中的人的光，

ccb.text: 你自信可以做盲人的向导、黑暗中的人的光、

csbs.text: 又深信自己是瞎子的领路人，是在黑暗中人的光，
